about_introduction: 👋 Hi there! This is LetsShip, the complete TanStack Start boilerplate for building profitable SaaS, packed with AI, auth, database, storage, blog, email, newsletter, payments, dashboard, SEO, and more, fully deployed on Cloudflare Workers. If you have any questions, please welcome to contact us for free.

blocks_hero_title: Ship Faster with TanStack, Cost Less with Cloudflare
blocks_hero_description: The complete TanStack Start boilerplate for building profitable SaaS, packed with AI, auth, database, storage, blog, email, newsletter, payments, dashboard, SEO, and more, fully deployed on Cloudflare Workers
blocks_features_description: Built-in features so you can focus on your product
blocks_features_item1_description: Store and query your data with a powerful database layer. Supports relations, migrations, and type-safe access.
blocks_features_item2_description: Secure auth with email, OAuth, and magic links. Session management and role-based access built in.
blocks_features_item3_description: User profiles, avatars, and account management. Connect multiple providers per user.
blocks_features_item4_description: Track usage and conversions. Dashboards and reports out of the box.
blocks_features2_description: Everything you need to build and ship faster
blocks_faqs_item1_question: Can I change my plan later?
blocks_faqs_item1_answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of the next billing cycle.
blocks_faqs_item2_question: What payment methods do you accept?
blocks_faqs_item2_answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and wire transfer for annual plans.
blocks_faqs_item3_answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial on all paid plans. No credit card required.
blocks_faqs_item4_answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. Contact support for a full refund.
blocks_faqs_item5_answer: Email support is included for all plans. Pro and above get priority support.
blocks_testimonials_item1_quote: The best LetsShip kit we evaluated. Auth and billing just work.
blocks_testimonials_item2_quote: LetsShip really saved us months of development. We shipped our MVP in just 2 weeks.
blocks_testimonials_item3_quote: Clean code, great DX. We extended it for our use case easily.
blocks_testimonials_item4_quote: Finally a template that includes auth, billing, and dashboard out of the box. No more stitching boilerplate.
blocks_testimonials_item5_quote: The stack choices and structure are exactly what we needed.
blocks_testimonials_item6_quote: Best-in-class starter for production SaaS. Our team recommends it to every founder building with modern React.
blocks_integration_description: Connect to the tools you already use
blocks_integration_item1_description: Connect to OpenAI, Anthropic, and more.
blocks_integration_item2_description: Deploy and run in the cloud.
blocks_integration2_description: Connect seamlessly with popular platforms and services to enhance your workflow
blocks_calltoaction_description: Join thousands of teams building with LetsShip today

admin_feature_requests_reject_default_re: Thank you for submitting "{title}". After careful consideration, we've decided not to include this in our current roadmap. This may be due to overlap with existing features, technical constraints, or different priorities at this time. We appreciate your feedback and encourage you to continue sharing your ideas.
